name: KeyState
doc: Toggles between two values when a key on the keyboard is up or down. Note that this ugen does not prevent normal typing.

argDocs.keycode: The keycode value of the key to check.
argDocs.minval: The value to output when the key is not pressed.
argDocs.maxval: The value to output when the key is pressed.

name: MouseButton
doc: toggles between two values when the left mouse button is up or down

argDocs.up: value when the key is not pressed
argDocs.down: value when the key is pressed

name: MouseX
doc: maps the current mouse X coordinate to a value between min and max

argDocs.min: minimum value (when mouse is at the left of the screen)
argDocs.max: maximum value (when mouse is at the right of the screen)
argDocs.warp: mapping curve - either LINEAR or EXPONENTIAL (LIN and EXP abbreviations are allowed). Default is LINEAR.
argDocs.lag: lag factor to dezipper cursor movement.

name: MouseY
doc: maps the current mouse Y coordinate to a value between min and max

argDocs.min: minimum value (when mouse is at the top of the screen)
argDocs.max: maximum value (when mouse is at the bottom of the screen)
argDocs.warp: mapping curve - either LINEAR or EXPONENTIAL (LIN and EXP abbreviations are allowed). Default is LINEAR
argDocs.lag: lag factor to smooth out cursor movement.
